ValidationRule.description: requested ship date, shipment schedule and tentative productio schedule can not be blank.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Quote__r.CONTAINER_Status__c, 'Pending CAM Approval'),ISPICKVAL( Quote__r.ApprovalStatus__c , 'Pending'), OR( ISBLANK(Quote__r.CONTAINER_Requested_Ship_Date_Up_Check__c ), ISBLANK( Quote__r.CONTAINER_Shipment_Schedule_Update__c ), ISBLANK( Quote__r.CONTAINER_Tentative_Ship_Sc_Update_Check__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill Requested ship dates, Shipment schedule and Tentative production schedule records.
